final_files.tests/test_dependency_final.py:
from dependency_plan import Dependency, dependency_plan
from service_container import Container


def test_mixed_bindings_resolve_through_keyword_only_provider():
    container = Container()
    container.register("prefix", lambda: "ops")

    def formatter(prefix, /):
        return f"{prefix}-format"

    def audit_sink(*, formatter):
        return f"audit:{formatter}"

    def publisher(formatter, /, *, audit_sink):
        return f"publish:{formatter}:{audit_sink}"

    container.register("formatter", formatter)
    container.register("audit_sink", audit_sink)
    container.register("publisher", publisher)

    assert dependency_plan(publisher) == (
        Dependency("formatter", "positional"),
        Dependency("audit_sink", "keyword"),
    )
    assert container.resolve("publisher") == (
        "publish:ops-format:audit:ops-format"
    )
